subject: (no subject)
body:
Hello,

I noticed that my Cingular phone service has also been disconnected, again without any notice.  All I ask is that you pay the bill up to Aug 31st.  My overdue balance is up to that date.  

Also, Rich, as we have discussed in the past instead of sending you copies of my Cingular bills, in which GM agreed to pay for my blackberry service from the beginning  of my employment, I will simply give you my password to my account.  (My number is 6462632627 p/w is Morgan).  Beginning Dec 15-June 1st I will need to be reimbursed for.  

I mentioned to JE a few weeks back that I also have a few minor receipts totaling $166.00 that I will fax to Bella for reimbursement.  

And if I could ask one more thing.  Bella when you have time could you please pull the totals paid to me and Mr Justin Krebs so I can begin to pay JE back.  They will not be large monthly payments but payback nonetheless.  You can simply email me the totals.  Thank you Bella.  

If you need to reach me and can’t through my cell, for obvious reasons, my email is catherinederby@hotmail.com.  

Thank you for all of your help.  I sincerely appreciate it, and always have.  

Best,
Catherine


_________________________________________________________________
Windows Live Hotmail and Microsoft Office Outlook – together at last.  Get it now.
http://office.microsoft.com/en-us/outlook/HA102225181033.aspx?pid=CL100626971033
